term: so tāsaṁ vedanānaṁ samudayañca atthaṅgamañca assādañca ādīnavañca nissaraṇañca yathābhūtaṁ pajānāti
preferred_translation: one discerns those feelings' arising and vanishing, gratification, danger, and escape as they have come to be
definition: SN 36.6's trained plural feeling-discernment line that blocks the ignorance tendency.
notes: Use this record for the trained SN 36.6 plural-feelings line. Keep the five-part discernment structure aligned with MN 148 while preserving the plural reference to the three feeling registers.

example_phrases.pali: so tāsaṁ vedanānaṁ samudayañca atthaṅgamañca assādañca ādīnavañca nissaraṇañca yathābhūtaṁ pajānāti
example_phrases.translation: one discerns those feelings' arising and vanishing, gratification, danger, and escape as they have come to be
example_phrases.notes: Trained plural feeling-discernment line in SN 36.6.

authority_basis.scope: Supports the plural feeling-discernment line that blocks the ignorance tendency.

translation_policy.default_scope: Use this as the standard English control line for the trained plural feeling-discernment formula in SN 36.6.
translation_policy.when_not_to_apply: Do not flatten the line into generic understanding language or lose the five-part discernment structure.
translation_policy.drift_risk: Prevents the SN 36.6 plural line from drifting away from the governed gratification-danger-escape pattern.
